reviews.review_description: This game is really fun. There is lots of cosmetics and the best thing about this game id it has find the button and lots of other game modes and it’s really fun. There even is LIV so we can make content. It might need to progress more but for now it’s the best game.
This game is a really fun alternative to gorilla tag because there are a lot of modes and there’s a chill force that you can hang out with a bunch of your friends. (:￼

I think that this game is the best because it has multiple game modes like find the button, zero gravity, gun pvp, and even a shop that he is still working on but is still great. This game is an upcoming project as I see it and I hope that people like it just like I do keep it up!👍
